video.title: Chris Froome Conquers the Zoncolan Ahead of Simon Yates | Giro d'Italia 2018 | Stage 14 Key Moments

transcript.clean_text: let's look back then at the key moments of the day we start with our breakaway mateo monteguti francesco cavazzi and rico barbie dda mads patterson valerio conte and jacobo mosca they stayed out in front valerio conti winning a handful of points in the king of the mountains on the day in total conti managed to take his overall tally up to 33 points and he was the first man to get onto the zonkolan climb as well an extraordinary atmosphere awaited the riders over a hundred thousand reportedly gathered on the slopes of montes oncolan and as expected there were several attacks made he got anton the man who won in 2011 one of the first to go and michael woods also tried his luck on the the lower elements but it was chris froome who made the decisive attack with four kilometers left to go through him setting off on his own initially pots of evo gates and lopez managed to stay with him but when he attacked for a second time those three were dropped too simon yates though knew that what he needed to do was put as much time between him and the defending champion tom demoula as possible so he attacked lopez and pozzovivo and pulled away from them with ease closing the gap on froome in the process yates knowing that he needs to have a considerable advantage going into the time trial in the end yates wasn't emerged from the tunnel it's chris froome to turn right after five hours and 24 minutes of racing at the minute he has a minute lead over the maya doors but look at the power of the pink jersey simon yates is gaining all of the time he needs those ten bonus seconds he wants the third victory in the mariota and chris froome's victory might well be in trouble here and listen to this it's what they've been waiting for all day long and just to add to a sense of the occasion the rain is falling and starting to pour at the top of mountains there's one more right turn and then a mighty kick left to the line yates with another big effort to try and catch him the general italia in play right here right now it's been four years since you've been here but it's been a long time since we have big gc action up there 200 meters for chris froome who attacked a long long way out in relation to this climb but look at the two men contrasting styles and both with the same age they both need the stage he's grabbing that bike for dear life as he spins away behind grinding away it's simon yates or i don't think he's gonna get there now chris froome's gonna pull away one final time and i think it's going to be a huge confidence boosting stage win for him and for team sky froome turns the corner this was unthinkable a few days ago the confidence boost is there it's launch pad for chris froome as he is back in the gym italia stage win for him stage win for sky but in the meantime simon yates keeps the pink jersey and extends his lead and he will watch that watch now as it turns all the way back to tom dumoulin next to come over and it's a fight for mona second stomping he called ports of evil who was again looked very good in the mountains he's still in the fight for the pink jersey he comes over 23 seconds behind chris froome you
